caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TIME" printed in gold letters sits at a desk in a studio. He holds a gold-colored tablet or folder in his hands and looks toward someone off-camera to his left. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five gold stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A blue sign on the wall behind him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black box and a white container with red and black text that says "TALK OUT". The man's posture remains mostly consistent across the scene, though he shifts his gaze and slightly adjusts the position of the folder in his hands as he speaks.
